channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 2025 Royal Rumble: 5 predictions for major WWE premium live event
item.description: The Royal Rumble takes place Saturday night in Indianapolis, and there's no shoo-in for the winners. A lot could happen at the event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pelicans' Dejounte Murray suffers lower right leg injury and team braces for long absence
item.description: New Orleans guard Dejounte Murray left the Pelicans’ game against Boston in the first quarter with an injury to his lower right leg.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Steve Kerr: Warriors can’t ‘stand pat’ at upcoming trade deadline
item.description: Warriors head coach Steve Kerr addressed the upcoming trade deadline before the Warriors' game against the Suns.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Sepp Straka leads by 3 at Pebble Beach as rough weather awaits the weekend
item.description: Straka's hot start leaves Rory McIlroy, Scottie Scheffler and everyone having to chase him on the Central Coast.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Neymar signs short contract as Santos fans give him a welcome home party
item.description: SANTOS, Brazil (AP) — A tearful Neymar was welcomed back to his boyhood club on Friday by thousands of Santos fans and a concert in the home stadium beneath an electronic sign saying, “The prince is back.” The striker signed a contract upon arrival, reportedly valid to the end of June.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The NCAA settles lawsuit with Tennessee and Virginia over compensation rules for recruits
item.description: The NCAA has settled the lawsuit with the attorneys general of Tennessee and Virginia and other states over its rules prohibiting name, image and likeness compensation for recruits. Notice that a settlement has been reached in principle with a term sheet signed was filed Friday with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At least 18 objections filed to $2.8B NCAA antitrust settlement, lawyers confident of approval
item.description: The deadline has come and gone for objections to be filed against the landmark $2.8 billion settlement of antitrust allegations against the NCAA and the five largest athletic conferences.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jason and Kylie Kelce reveal Super Bowl loyalties amid conflicting ties to Chiefs, Eagles
item.description: Jason and Kylie Kelce reveal whom they are rooting for in Super Bowl LIX between the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles as the couple have ties to both teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Terry Rozier declines to address investigation, says he won't have issue focusing on basketball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Terry Rozier declined to answer questions Friday about the investigations by federal prosecutors into unusual betting patterns surrounding his play in a game when he was with the Charlotte Hornets in 2023.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NHL salary cap over the next 3 seasons is getting its biggest increases since it started in 2005
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NHL salary cap is going up significantly next season, with even bigger increases set for the coming years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Laid-Back Pat: As the Chiefs chase Super Bowl history, Patrick Mahomes exudes a steadying calm
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes felt as though he needed to apologize after he helped the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Buffalo Bills in the AFC championship game, punching their ticket to the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres FanFest returns to Petco Park: what to know before you go
item.description: It's that time of year again: Padres FanFest is back and is expected to be bigger than ever, according to a spokesperson with the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Hall of Famer Dwyane Wade reveals 2023 kidney surgery to remove tumor later found to be cancerous
item.description: Hall of Fame player Dwyane Wade said doctors performed a December 2023 surgery on his kidney to remove a tumor later determined to be cancerous. “Thank God that I did do the surgery,” Wade said on his “The Why With Dwyane Wade” podcast episode released Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bronny James plays the whole 4th quarter -- with plenty of ups and downs -- in Lakers' blowout win
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Even on the road, Bronny James was quite a crowd favorite. Fans in Washington chanted for LeBron James' son early and often, and with the Los Angeles Lakers way ahead of the Wizards on Thursday night, the younger James played the entire fourth quarter of his team's 134-96 victory.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin moves within 19 goals of breaking Gretzky’s NHL record, scoring in Capitals' OT loss
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Alex Ovechkin moved within 19 goals of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record, scoring on a late power play in the Washington Capitals' 5-4 overtime loss to the Ottawa Senators on Thursday night. Ovechkin scored his 23nd goal of the season to push his career total to 876.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: 3 Tampa Bay small businesses awarded Super Bowl tickets for hurricane relief efforts
item.description: The Glazer Family, owners of the Tampa Bay Buccaneers awarded three small businesses with tickets to Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU outlasts Baylor in overtime, 93-89
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a perfect night for one BYU freshman, and a perfect ending for BYU Tuesday night against Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Madsen leads Utes past Cincinnati, 69-66
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored seven of his 18 points in the final two minutes, Keanu Dawes added 12 points and nine rebounds and Utah beat Cincinnati 69-66 on Tuesday night. Ezra Ausar scored 11 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alyssa Thomas heading to Mercury from Sun in trade, AP source says
item.description: The Phoenix Mercury were finalizing a deal to acquire Alyssa Thomas from the Connecticut Sun, a person familiar with the trade told The Associated Press on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox release 2025 promotional schedule
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced their promotions schedule for the 2025 MLB season, including limited-edition items and a first-ever Sunday Bobblehead Collector’s Series, to commemorate the 125-year anniversary of the team's founding.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Person seen firing gun into air amid crowd of Philadelphia Eagles fans; police investigating
item.description: Video of the alleged incident, shared to X late on Sunday, appeared to show a large crowd celebrating the Eagles' win when a person raised the gun into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR Chicago Street Race tickets go on sale Monday
item.description: CHICAGO — Tickets for the NASCAR Chicago Street Race go on sale to the public Monday. The third edition of Chicago Street Race Weekend will be back downtown from July 5-6, capping off the Fourth of July holiday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation
